validation_scope: Independent post-run validation of the DeepSeek official-provider trial

q1_1.note: Relative discrepancy is negligible, but the reported solution does not meet the strict absolute threshold.

q1_2.note: Relative discrepancy is negligible, but the reported solution does not meet the strict absolute threshold.

q2.note: Only a base-parameter recomputation exists; the selected stochastic scenario parameters were not retained.

q3.note: Only a base-parameter estimate exists; perturbed and correlation parameters were not retained.

required_follow_up: Persist full-precision decisions and Q2/Q3 effective parameters, then rerun independent objective recomputation.
